title: Marketing Analyst (m/w/d) - befristet bis September 2027
required_skills: 5+ Jahre Berufserfahrung im datengetriebenen Marketing oder Analytics
Sehr gute Kenntnisse in Microsoft Excel
missing_skills: Salesforce CRM workflow automation / Marketing Automation (no hands-on automation dev experience stated)
Lead qualification and lead handling processes (not explicitly mentioned in CV)
Explicit 5-year continuous data-driven marketing track record (experience spread across multiple roles)
core_responsibilities: Analyse customer, market, and campaign data; translate complex insights into actionable marketing strategies
Develop and optimize reporting structures, dashboards, and data processes; ensure high data quality
Evaluate and improve marketing performance along the full customer journey (acquisition & retention)
Lead qualification and efficient handover of qualified leads to sales teams
Develop automated CRM workflows in Salesforce; optimize lead and campaign logic for seamless marketing automation
culture_keywords: enge Zusammenarbeit mit Marketing- und Vertriebs-Teams
recommended_emphasis: Highlight KPI dashboard and ROI reporting work explicitly (Power BI certification, Hapag-Lloyd analytics role)
Quantify data-driven marketing results from Futu Holdings and Leyard Europe campaigns
Emphasize Salesforce experience and any automation or workflow tasks performed
Frame cross-functional collaboration (Product, Engineering, Marketing, C-suite at HSBC) as evidence of strong communication skills
Position the combined tenure across data-driven roles (2020–2025) as meeting the 5-year requirement
